/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/llama-gen-docs.dir/gen-docs.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-gen-docs  -Wl,-rpath,/home/newubuntu/llama.cpp/build_mem2/bin: ../../common/libcommon.a ../../bin/libllama.so ../../bin/libggml.so ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../../bin/libggml-base.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
